steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Step 1: The phrase "re-entering one of the checkers into the game" is a gerund phrase acting as the subject. A gerund phrase is always treated as a singular subject. The blank follows this subject and the linking verb "also".

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Step 2: The singular subject "re-entering" requires a singular verb.

Only "follows" (A) agrees with a singular subject.

The other choices use plural verbs ("are following", "have followed", "follow"), which violate subject-verb agreement for singular nouns.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
